title: Prism Chamber
public_claim: Implementation-ready handoff for the Prism Chamber doctrine — a vNext extension of the existing live Red Team Lab MuranoOS room.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
